calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: August 29,2002
Judge Pro Tem: Karl Olson
CSR: Beldon Yee

Case called for settlement conference-All parties present. Plaintiff's counsel recited the following on the record: Judgment for Plaintiff. Possession of premises located at 118 Taylor St.#221. Money judgment of $2968.00 waived if premises is vacated by August 30,2002 at 5:00 pm. Writ of possession immediately stayed until August 30,2002 at 5:00 pm. Each side to bear own costs. Plaintiff to prepare order.
